common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.notConfigured: No admin account exists yet and ADMIN_USERNAME / ADMIN_PASSWORD are not set on the server.

admin.welcome: Welcome back. Choose a section to manage.
admin.eventsCardHint: Create albums, upload photos, publish events.
admin.bookingsCardHint: Create bookable events and manage reservations.
admin.creditsCardHint: Manage remembered credits and their social links.
admin.siteCardHint: Customize the site title, homepage text, background and logo.
admin.resourceMonitorCardHint: See how much storage your photos, site images and database are using.

adminEvents.noEvents: No events yet. Create your first one.
adminEvents.titleHint: At least one language is required.
adminEvents.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes. Left empty, one is generated from the title.
adminEvents.dateRangeHint: Leave the end date empty for a single-day event.
adminEvents.validationError: Please fill in at least one title and check the fields.
adminEvents.confirmDeleteEvent: Delete this event and ALL its photos? This cannot be undone.
adminEvents.noPhotos: No photos yet — upload some below.
adminEvents.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Files are processed one at a time.
adminEvents.batchCreditHint: All photos in this batch will be tagged with the credit(s) above.
adminEvents.filesSelected: {count, plural, =1 {1 photo selected} other {# photos selected}}

adminCredits.title: {term}s
adminCredits.intro: Remembered credits and their social links. These are kept in sync automatically whenever you save a photo credit with links, and are offered as autofill the next time that same name comes up — or manage them directly here.
adminCredits.noCreditProfiles: No remembered {term}s yet — they're added automatically the first time you save a photo credit with social links.
adminCredits.duplicateError: A credit with that name already exists.
adminCredits.confirmDelete: Delete this remembered profile? This won't affect any photos already crediting them.

adminSite.title: Site settings
adminSite.intro: Customize how the public site looks. Changes apply immediately.
adminSite.groupHeaderHint: The site name and logo shown in the header. The site name also appears in the footer. Leave title fields empty to use the default.
adminSite.groupBackgroundHint: The page background shown behind every public page.
adminSite.groupHomepageHint: The hero headline, subtitle, and sidebar links shown on the homepage. Leave a text field empty to use the default.
adminSite.groupCreditsHint: Vocabulary used across the photo-credit editor, quick stats, and booking form (e.g. a cosplay-photography site might use "Cosplayer"/"Character"), and whether credit-profile management is available in the dashboard. Leave a term empty to use the default.
adminSite.groupBookingHint: The photoshoot booking page, its calendar, and the contact-method options shown in the booking form. Off hides the Booking nav link and blocks the public page; existing bookings stay manageable.
adminSite.groupLotteryHint: The lottery draw page. Off hides the Lottery nav link and blocks the public page; existing draws stay manageable.
adminSite.contactHint: Shows a "Contact us" button in the site header and footer. The link and QR code are set separately for each language below, so an English visitor and a Chinese visitor can see different contact methods (e.g. WhatsApp vs. WeChat).
adminSite.contactUrlEn: Link (English site, opens in a new tab)
adminSite.contactUrlZh: Link (Chinese site, opens in a new tab)
adminSite.backgroundColorHint: The page background color for the public site. Keep the default for the standard dark theme.
adminSite.backgroundImageHint: Optional full-page image shown behind the public site, over the background color. Saved as soon as you upload it.
adminSite.uploadBackgroundError: Upload failed. Use a JPEG, PNG or WebP within the size limit.
adminSite.logoHint: Shown at the top-left of the site header, next to the site name, and links back to the homepage. A PNG with a transparent background works best. Saved as soon as you upload it.
adminSite.uploadLogoError: Upload failed. Use a JPEG, PNG or WebP within the size limit.
adminSite.contactQrEnHint: Optional QR code shown in the Contact us card on the English site (e.g. a chat app add-friend code). Saved as soon as you upload it.
adminSite.uploadContactQrEnError: Upload failed. Use a JPEG, PNG or WebP within the size limit.
adminSite.contactQrZhHint: Optional QR code shown in the Contact us card on the Chinese site (e.g. a WeChat add-friend code). Saved as soon as you upload it.
adminSite.uploadContactQrZhError: Upload failed. Use a JPEG, PNG or WebP within the size limit.
adminSite.saveError: Couldn't save. Please check the fields and try again.
adminSite.contactMethodsHint: Options shown in the booking form's contact-method dropdown, in the order listed below.
adminSite.noContactMethods: No contact methods yet — add at least one so visitors can book.
adminSite.contactMethodValidationError: Please fill in at least one label.
adminSite.personalLinksHint: Links to your other sites/profiles, shown in the homepage sidebar in the order listed below.

adminStorage.title: Resource monitor
adminStorage.intro: How much disk space your photos, site images, and database are using right now.
adminStorage.eventsHint: Largest events first — the original plus thumbnail/medium/full renditions of every photo.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.empty: New photos are on the way — check back soon.

adminBookings.titleHint: At least one language is required.
adminBookings.validationError: Please fill in at least one title and check the fields.
adminBookings.shareLinkHint: Anyone with this link can view the event and book a slot — no account needed.
adminBookings.noSlots: No time slots yet — add some below.
adminBookings.confirmDeleteSlot: Delete this slot? All its bookings will be removed too.
adminBookings.restoreSlotFull: This slot is full — cancel another booking or raise the slot's capacity first.
adminBookings.confirmDeleteEvent: Delete this booking event, its slots and all bookings? This cannot be undone.

adminLottery.title: Prize draw
adminLottery.chooseEntrant: Choose an entrant to spin for
adminLottery.noEntriesLeft: No entrants left to spin for.
adminLottery.spinError_not_found: That entrant or prize no longer exists. Please refresh.
adminLottery.spinError_already_spun: That entrant already spun. Please refresh.
adminLottery.prizeChanceHint: Chance is a relative weight, not a percentage — a prize with chance 10 is about 10x as likely to come up as one with chance 1, among prizes still in stock.
adminLottery.prizeValidationError: Please enter a prize name, and an amount and chance of at least 1.
adminLottery.entriesHint: Select which confirmed bookings take part. Each gets a unique draw token.
adminLottery.removeEntryAria: Remove this entrant from the draw
adminLottery.noAvailableBookings: No confirmed bookings left to add — everyone confirmed is already entered.
adminLottery.shareLinkHint: Anyone with this link can enter themselves into the draw by filling in their CN and contact info — no account needed.
adminLottery.openForEntryHint: When on, anyone with the link can add themselves to the draw. Turn it off to lock the pool — people already entered can still spin.

lotteryEntry.title: Prize draw entry
lotteryEntry.name: CN
lotteryEntry.errorValidation: Please check your details — CN, a contact method and your contact info are required.
lotteryEntry.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts from your network. Please try again later.
lotteryEntry.errorClosed: This draw is not currently accepting entries.
lotteryEntry.errorDuplicate: You've already entered this draw with that contact info.
lotteryEntry.errorNotFound: This entry link is no longer valid.
lotteryEntry.successNotice: You're entered! Watch the wheel for your token.
lotteryEntry.noPrizesYet: No prizes have been added yet.
lotteryEntry.spinError_rateLimited: Too many attempts from your network. Please wait and try again.
lotteryEntry.spinError_notReady: The prize draw isn't available right now.
lotteryEntry.spinError_notFound: That entry or prize no longer exists. Please refresh.

booking.listEmpty: No photoshoots are open for booking right now — check back soon.
booking.closedNotice: This event is currently not open for booking.
booking.noSlotsNotice: No time slots are available yet — check back later.
booking.name: CN
booking.subject: {term} (optional)
booking.contactHint: Choose how you'd like to be reached, then enter your username or number for it.
booking.notesPlaceholder: Style, references, anything I should know…
booking.errorValidation: Please check your details — CN, a contact method and your contact info are required.
booking.errorSlotFull: That slot just filled up. Please pick another one.
booking.errorSlotUnavailable: That slot is no longer available.
booking.errorRateLimited: Too many booking attempts from your network. Please try again later.
booking.errorClosed: This event is not open for booking.
booking.saveLinkNotice: Booking confirmed! Save this page's link to come back anytime — or use "Check your booking" on the event page with your CN and contact info.
booking.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
booking.checkHint: Enter the CN and contact info you booked with to find your booking, spin the wheel, and see your prize.
booking.checkNotFound: No booking found with that CN and contact info for this event.
booking.checkErrorValidation: Please enter both your CN and your contact info.
booking.checkErrorRateLimited: Too many attempts from your network. Please try again later.
booking.checkResultSpinReady: The prize wheel is ready — open your booking to spin.

setup.welcomeTitle: Welcome — let's set up your site
setup.welcomeHint: A few quick steps to get your site ready.
setup.credentialsHint: You just signed in with the placeholder credentials from your server's environment file. Choose your own username and password to continue.
setup.credentialsInvalid: Please fill in all fields — the password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.credentialsUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
setup.brandHint: This is the brand name shown in the header and footer. Leave both blank to use the default name.
setup.hometextHint: The headline and subtitle visitors see first. Leave a field blank to use the default copy.
setup.featuresStepHint: Turn features on or off — you can always change this later from Site settings.
setup.bookingPreview: Adds a "Photoshoot booking" button and calendar to the homepage, plus a Bookings section in the admin.
setup.lotteryPreview: Adds a prize-draw tool to booking events, with a shareable public entry link and spinning wheel.
setup.creditProfilesPreview: Remembers {term}s' social links so photo-credit forms can autofill them next time.
setup.contactHint: Contact methods visitors can use when booking.
setup.contactRequiredError: Add at least one contact method to continue.
setup.optionalStepHint: This step is optional — skip it and set it up later from Site settings.
setup.finishHint: We'll create a draft album (and a draft booking event, if enabled) so you have something to explore. Publish or delete them anytime from the admin.
